chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-1397 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 04.12.2025 Mr.Muhammad Hashim Laghari, Advocate for the applicant Ms.Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for the State ****** Heard arguments. For reasons to be recorded, post arrest bail is granted to the applicant/accused Allah Ditta s/o Akbar Ali, subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of trial Court. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
